mind.content: I hate leetcode, it feels useless
mind.why_this_feeling: You feel this way for an unknown reason.

meta_insight.pattern: Frustration and resistance arise when effort is perceived as disconnected from practical value or real-world utility.
meta_insight.principle: Humans are driven by perceived purpose and utility; tasks lacking these often lead to demotivation and negative emotional responses.
meta_insight.strategy: When assigning or explaining tasks that may seem abstract or tedious (e.g., foundational exercises, theoretical concepts), explicitly articulate their long-term benefits, underlying skill development, or direct applications to enhance perceived value and motivation.

strategy.use_case: When assigning or explaining tasks that may seem abstract or tedious (e.g., foundational exercises, theoretical concepts), explicitly articulate their long-term benefits, underlying skill development, or direct applications to enhance perceived value and motivation.
